title: Smooth Create
description: Performance modpack with the Create mod!
body:
Here's a modpack for low end computer who wanna play Create comfortably.

If you don't know how to install a modpack, I would recommend using the Modrinth app or Prism Launcher.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/C5hwqXfevEU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
